headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Rollins, Lowers Price Target to $58
summary: UBS  analyst Joshua Chan   maintains Rollins (NYSE:ROL) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $62 to $58.

headline: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: Rollins (NYSE:ROL) And The Rest Of The Environmental and Facilities Services Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the environmental and facilities services stocks, including Rollins (NYSE:ROL) and its peers.
